description:
# Travel Journal with Media

Rich travel journal with photo and video uploads, text notes, location tagging, mood tracking, and media organization. Users can document daily experiences, add memories, and organize content by trip or date with automatic backups.

## Rationale
Addresses user pain point: 'Difficulty documenting and sharing travel experiences in one place.' Addresses competitor issues with clunky journal apps (pain-4-2) and crashes when adding photos (pain-2-2). Solo travelers value being able to document and share their adventures.

## User Stories
- As a traveler, I want to document my daily experiences with photos and notes so that I can remember my trip
- As a user, I want to organize my journal by trip so that I can easily find memories from specific adventures
- As a traveler, I want to upload photos in the background so that I can continue using the app while they sync

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Users can create journal entries with rich text formatting
- [ ] Photos and videos upload in background with compression
- [ ] Entries are automatically tagged with location and date
- [ ] Users can organize entries by trip, date, or custom tags
- [ ] Media gallery views all photos/videos from a trip
- [ ] Offline editing with sync when connection available
- [ ] Export or share entire trips or individual entries
- [ ] Memory timeline shows chronological view of all travel experiences

subtasks.title: Design database schema for journal entries and media
subtasks.description: Create Supabase tables for journal_entries, media_items, trips, and tags with proper relationships

subtasks.title: Set up storage buckets for media
subtasks.description: Create Supabase storage buckets for photos and videos with proper RLS policies

subtasks.title: Create TypeScript types for journal entities
subtasks.description: Define TypeScript interfaces for JournalEntry, MediaItem, Trip, and Tag

subtasks.title: Implement rich text editor component
subtasks.description: Create a rich text editor with formatting options (bold, italic, lists, headers)

subtasks.title: Create journal entry creation flow
subtasks.description: Build UI and logic for creating new journal entries with title, content, and date

subtasks.title: Implement journal entry API functions
subtasks.description: Create CRUD operations for journal entries using Supabase

subtasks.title: Build journal entry detail view
subtasks.description: Create screen to view individual journal entries with all content

subtasks.title: Implement image compression utility
subtasks.description: Create utility to compress images before upload while maintaining quality

subtasks.title: Create video compression utility
subtasks.description: Implement video compression for reduced file sizes

subtasks.title: Build media picker component
subtasks.description: Create component to select photos and videos from device library

subtasks.title: Implement background upload service
subtasks.description: Create service to upload media in background with queue management

subtasks.title: Add upload progress indicator
subtasks.description: Show progress bars for media uploads in journal entries

subtasks.title: Implement automatic location tagging
subtasks.description: Capture and store location data when creating journal entries

subtasks.title: Create location picker component
subtasks.description: Allow users to manually select or edit location for entries

subtasks.title: Extract EXIF data from photos
subtasks.description: Pull location and date metadata from uploaded photos

subtasks.title: Add mood tracking feature
subtasks.description: Allow users to tag entries with mood emojis

subtasks.title: Create trip management system
subtasks.description: Allow users to create and manage trips to organize entries

subtasks.title: Implement custom tags feature
subtasks.description: Create tagging system for categorizing entries

subtasks.title: Build trip overview screen
subtasks.description: Show all entries and media for a specific trip

subtasks.title: Add search and filter functionality
subtasks.description: Allow searching entries by text, location, date, or tags

subtasks.title: Create media gallery grid view
subtasks.description: Build grid layout to display all photos and videos from a trip

subtasks.title: Implement fullscreen media viewer
subtasks.description: Create modal to view photos and videos at full screen

subtasks.title: Build memory timeline view
subtasks.description: Create chronological timeline of all travel experiences

subtasks.title: Add map view for trip locations
subtasks.description: Display all journal locations on an interactive map

subtasks.title: Implement offline storage with SQLite
subtasks.description: Set up local database for offline journal entry storage

subtasks.title: Create sync service
subtasks.description: Implement bidirectional sync between local and remote databases

subtasks.title: Add conflict resolution logic
subtasks.description: Handle conflicts when same entry is edited offline and online

subtasks.title: Implement offline mode indicator
subtasks.description: Show visual indicator when app is in offline mode

subtasks.title: Implement trip export to PDF
subtasks.description: Generate PDF document with all entries and media from a trip

subtasks.title: Add social media sharing
subtasks.description: Allow sharing individual entries or media to social platforms

subtasks.title: Create public trip sharing links
subtasks.description: Generate shareable links for trips with optional password protection

subtasks.title: Add backup and restore functionality
subtasks.description: Allow users to backup all journal data and restore it

subtasks.title: Build main journal list screen
subtasks.description: Create screen showing all journal entries organized by trip or date

subtasks.title: Add entry preview cards
subtasks.description: Create cards showing entry summary, date, location, and thumbnail

subtasks.title: Implement pull-to-refresh
subtasks.description: Add pull-to-refresh gesture to update journal list

subtasks.title: Add empty state and onboarding
subtasks.description: Show helpful message when no journal entries exist yet

subtasks.title: Write unit tests for journal API functions
subtasks.description: Test all CRUD operations and edge cases

subtasks.title: Test media upload and compression
subtasks.description: Verify media compression and upload functionality

subtasks.title: Test offline sync functionality
subtasks.description: Verify offline editing and sync behavior

subtasks.title: Performance optimization
subtasks.description: Optimize image loading, list rendering, and database queries

subtasks.title: Error handling improvements
subtasks.description: Add better error messages and recovery options

subtasks.title: Accessibility audit
subtasks.description: Ensure all screens are accessible with screen readers
